parsed_output.justification: Mitchell claimed to be the Insomniac very early in the discussion, which Paul and James identified as a potential Werewolf bluff designed to provide a safe alibi without offering verifiable information. While Justin attempted to defend Mitchell, he became contradictory in his own claims toward the end of the game. Since James (claiming Robber) and Paul (claiming Villager) both expressed strong suspicion toward Mitchell, he is the most likely candidate for elimination to help Team Village win.
